MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES;
Megan Johnson, 415.649.6203 for Plaintiffs Neil Penaflor, Bienvenida Penaflor and Charlie Peneflor.
No other appearances.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record is DENIED. No reason for withdrawal provided. "An attorney may not, in the absence of the client's consent, withdraw from a case without justifiable cause" Lovvorn v. Johnston (9th Cir. 1941) 118 F.2d 704, 706.
